positive: A minimalist, stylized abstract cosmic cat silhouette, centered composition, facing forward. The cat is rendered in deep indigo and celestial black tones, outlined with glowing, vibrant nebula dust in electric teal, magenta, and gold foil accents. It is surrounded by sweeping, stylized constellations and geometric planetary rings, forming a vibrant, high-contrast celestial field. Clean vector art aesthetic meets cosmic surrealism. Perfect for apparel printing, strong contrast, simple shapes, clean edges, digital vector illustration, flat design, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blur, poorly drawn, low detail, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, artifact, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, grain, bokeh
